textPlain:
This looks great!
I also gave it a try, uploaded a transparent png (which was converted to black, fair enough, guess there's no good default choice for all cases) and scanned the pretty QR code with my phone: Flawless.
Thanks for building and sharing this, I love to see QR codes become more readable

This is cool, but what's the use of error correction when you're deliberately introducing noise?In my experience, these art-y qr codes are more challenging to scan than traditional plain variants, especially in real life scenarios where you don't always have a perfectly clear image
